fitness_function.formula: max_distance*100 + upright*0.1 + velocity*0.05 + time_alive*0.01 - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*100

result.gait_description: Hops when it falls, takes one step forward, then stops. No sustained locomotion.

diagnosis.problem: max_distance plateaus after first lunge — fitness stops increasing once peak x is reached
diagnosis.effect: No incentive to keep moving after the initial hop. time_alive+velocity terms too small (~20 total) vs distance term (~300) to drive continued motion.
diagnosis.fix_in_next: Replace max_distance with cumulative_distance (integral of forward velocity × dt)

artifacts.note: best_params.npy was overwritten by exp002 run. Fitness curve preserved.
